name: pysnmp-mibs

metadata.name: pysnmp-mibs
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A collection of IETF & IANA MIBs pre-compiled for PySNMP

documentation:
A collection of IETF & IANA MIBs compiled into PySNMP classes.
Note that there is also PySMI package (https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pysmi/) that converts ASN.1 MIBs into PySNMP form.
Latest PySNMP (4.3+) invokes PySMI automatically to handle ASN.1 MIBs.
See http://pysnmp.sf.net & http://pysmi.sf.net
